description_long: This bungalow features a broad, low-pitched hip roof with a shingle texture, extending over a single-story rectangular structure. The exterior walls are predominantly dark, contrasting with the light, striped lawn or yard pattern that surrounds the building. The front facade includes a covered porch area with visible support columns and a small set of steps leading up to the entrance. Large windows are grouped along the sides, providing ample natural light and a modern touch to the otherwise traditional form. The property is bordered by vertical fence elements on one side, and the yard displays a geometric, striped landscaping design. The overall appearance is a blend of classic bungalow proportions with contemporary landscaping and window arrangements.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide hip roof, dark exterior walls, and a striped geometric yard, featuring a covered porch and grouped side windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and geometric striped yard with vertical fence elements.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the porch, side windows, and the intersection of the hip roof with the striped landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the hip roof, grouped side windows, and the continuation of the striped yard pattern.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the large window groupings, porch area, and the geometric landscaping adjacent to the building.
